title: thalictrum simplex subsp. rariflorum
intro: Thalictrum simplex subsp. rariflorum, also known as meadow rue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, meadow rue has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Meadow rue can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its potential to promote wound healing and reduce symptoms of eczema and acne.
